pericopes.title: Habakukkuk adih louva thu kitan chunga akiphin
Chaldea miten Judah gam talen amatsah ding
Habakkuk chun Pakai koma photchetna asei

chapters.text: Pathen thuphondoh Habakkuk themgaopan themgao thilmua amudoh:
O Pakai, itih chan geiyaba katao ding hiya Nangman donbut louhel’a neikoi ding hitam? “Pumhat jengin thil akiboltai!” tin sam jong leng Nangman neihuhhing lou ding ham?

Ipi dinga nangin adih louva thil hijat kibol hi neimusah a Genthei hesoh hijatpi hi neivetsah sah jeng ham? Kamasanga manthahna le pumhat jenga thil kibol adimset’in, Kinahna le kidouna jeng apengdoh doh jeng e.
Hijeh hin danthu jeng jong ahatjou pon, Adih lamin jong thu akitan kha tapoi. Migilouten midih ho aumchah jenguvin, Adih a thu kitan jong akibol nah vangin akaleh-in akihei jengjin ahi.
Namtin vaipi lah khu galdot’uvin lang vetem’uvin, Kidang sauvin lang datmo soh keiyui; Ajeh chu keiman nangho khanga thil khat kabol ahin, Nakiseipeh mongu jongleh natahsan lou diu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh neihin vetan, Chaldea mi giloutah le kinotah nam khu katildoh a, Leiset vaipi khokhongsoh a hung kitol diu, Achenna khah louvu leiset jouse akilah diu ahi.
Chaldea mite hi tijat le kichat umtah ahiuvin, Adih a thutan kitileh gunchena jong amaho cham chama aboldoh thu jengu ahi.

Asakolteu jong lutnute sangin akaljang jon, Nilhah dunga keichangte sangin gin aumjouve, Sakol touthem mi aneihouvin jong ano no jengun, Hiche sakol touthem ho hi gamla tah a kona hung ahiuve; Midang bahgam dingin amaho hi Muvanlai bangin hamvi ven aleng jenguve.
Abonchauva hi pumhat’a thilbol dia hung kon ahiuvin, Amasanguva kichat tijat akitolpeh-e. Sohchanga soh chang mong mong jong Neldi jat akhomdoh tauve.
Leng ho jouse jong totnan aneiyuvin, Vaihom jouse jong kichep nan aneitauve. Kulpi jouse anuisat jengun, Leiset akisesang mai maiyuvin, baitah-in akilah jiuvin ajou jiuve.
Hitobang hin hui nung bangin Hamheo houvin akitol tol jengun, Themmona nei mihem ahiuvin Athahatnau hi pathen dana aneiyu ahitai.

Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, keidia Athengpen, Nangma hi tonsot tonsot’a umjing nahilou ham? Keihon thina kato khah lou diu ahi. O Pakai, nangin amaho hi thutanna namanchah ahin, Vo kiselna Songpi nangin amaho hi Mi bolgima suhdihna nei ding nagot ahitai.

Thilse vetna din namit teni jong atheng behseh-in, Hijeh chun thildihlou navethei poi; Itidana nangin kitahna neilou mi navet vetjenga Migilouvin ama sanga dihjo mi a bahgam jongleh thip beh a nauma nadonlou ham?
Ajeh chu nangin mihem jong hi Twikhanglena nga tobang bep’a nakoiji ahin, Vaihom neilouva um A-op’a kithol tho ganhing bep’a nagelji ahi.
Abonchauva hi ngakoiya kikhaidoh doh uva, Len’a kichundoh doh jeng ahiuvin; Alen khon dunga ahuikhomsoh keijin Hiti hin akipahjin akichoi sang lheh jie.
Hitobang mi hin anga matna len chu ahou jin kilhaina apen, Alenkhon dung jong chu ahouvin gimnamtui alhut khumin, Hiche lenkhon dunga kimandoh nga a nopsah a hing ahin, Antui tui anehji ahiye.
Ama hin alena nga akisut sutjenga Namtin vaipi hi hepina beihel’a athagam ding ham?

Keima ding ing ting phatecha kavet ding, Intingvuma kadina kavet lhih jing ding, Chutengleh aman kajah a ipi asei ding ham Kavet jing jeng ding ahi; Chujou tengleh kiphinna kanei chung changa hi Iti kadonbut ding ham kagel ding ahi.
Hichun Pakaiyin eidonbut’in aseiye: “Hiche themgao thilmua namu hi Thengsel’in songpheng chunga sundoh-in; Chutileh asim nom tapouvin Lhaijel’a asimthei ding ahi.

Ajeh chu hiche thil kimu hin aphat anga jing ding, Hung kichaivah loi ding ahi, jouthei lou ahiye. Ngongkai lheh tobangin aum nan, Ngah hat jingin; Thon louhel’a hung lhung tei ding ahi, Kinomsot lou ding ahibouve.
Vetan, alungsunga alungdih loupa chu Pang theilou ding ahin, Midih jong chu Atahsan vanga hing ding ahiye.

Chukitma leh ju kiti hi mi lhemlha pang ahin, Mi kiletsah hoithopa jong pang jou lou ding; Alop dan jong hi noimigam banga homleng lunga um ahin, Thina banga chimtih neilouva umjing ahi. Namtin vaipi geiyin ahenga akhomsoh keiyin, Mitin vaipi jong’ amite bangin alhoh khome,” ati.

Hiche miho hin ama douna kiletsah hoitho athouva, atot chatvaiyuva, hitia asei lou diu ham? “Ohe ada ahi, ama neilou anei banga kibol’a kikhol khompa, Ajeh chu phat itih chanpi sunga bat’a thil alah lah a neng kei koiya akhol ding ham?” tia.
Nangin bat naneina ho chu Hetman louva hung kipatdoh jeng uva Naleibat mihon kitihot hot’a nalha lou ding ham? Chujou tengleh nangma amaho dia chomgam dia naum ding ahi.

Nangin namtin vaipi tamtah nachom gamtan, Ahinla mitin vaipi lah a ahingdoh amoh chengsen nangma nachom diu ahi; Mihem thisan naso jeh leh leiset’a Pumhat jenga thil naboljeh hin, Khopi jouse nabolset’a chule Asunga chengte nathagam jeh ahipene.
Ohe ada ahi, ainsung dinga adih louva Phatchomna thil kilah lah a, Akipalna ding thang chunglama tahdoh a, Iman asuhset louna dinga hoidoh nange, tia umpa chu!
Nangman na-insung dinga thilse naboldoh doh ahin, Mitin vaipi hijat nathajeh a hi Nahinkho jeng jong hi Nangman nakisuh manglo ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itileh bang dunga song kisehon thu hinseiyin tin, Inkama kijam thingin jong ahindonbut ding ahi.
Ohe ada ahi, thisan hat’a khopi kisah a, Themmona vanga khopi tungdoh pa!
Vetan, mitin vaipin meikahvam ding bep a Hitobanga na atoh uva, Namtin vaipi hijat hin amaho le amaho cholna akibol’u hi Thaneipen Pakaiya hung kon hilou ham?
Ajeh chu twiyin Twikhanglen achup mang hel banga Leiset jong hi Pakai loupi hetna hung dim ding ahi.
Ohe ada ahi, aheng akom jong Pakai lungsatna khona donsah a, Abonchauva donkhamsah soh hel’a Ajachat ajum nau vetdia gopa chu!

Loupina sanga lung phatmona Thao kinu banga jolsel’a nakinu ding ahi. Nachangseh-in don donin lang Lonle len lang lam jot temin! Pakaiyin akhut jetlama adop jing khon; Nakimvel’a hung lhung ding, naloupina chu jum nan akhu ding ahi;

Lebanon lhanga pumhat’a thil nabol chun Nangma nakhup nathal’a nale ding ahin; Sahem kithagam chun nati nalu ajatsah ding. Ajeh chu leiset’a pumhat changa Mihem thisan kisoa pumhat’a thil kibol, Khopi jouse leh asunga cheng ho chunga kibol chu ahi.

Milimdoi kisem hi ipi phachom ham? Ajeh chu asempan thil khat a asemdoh ahin. Mi joulhep’a Athua nunsah na dinga abol ahibouve, Ahinla khut themvanga hitobang Paomo milimdoi kisemdoh pi hi Asempa tah tah jong chun Ama semsa chu aging chajin ahi!

Ohe ada ahi, thinga kisem thil jah a ‘Thoudoh temin,’ tia seiya; Song paomo jah khat’a ‘Thouvin’ tia seipa chu! Hitobang thil hin Thu aphondoh thei ding hinam? Vetan, athil hi sana le dangka kiloijol ahin. Asunga haitheina hu aum hih hel’e.
Pakai vang chu ahouin thenga achenge; A-angsunga leiset pumpi thip chet’in um’u hen.
Thina lapi kai toh kitoh a sah dinga Habakkuk themgaopan taona la abol:

O Pakai, nachung chang thu kithang kajan. Vo Pakai, nakhutsoh nathilbol kaginge. Kum kimlai jongleh hinsemthah kit’in. Kum kimlai jongleh kihetsah kit’in: Nalungsat teng jongleh Hepina hin geldoh tei teiyin.
Temana konin Pathen ahungin, Paran molsanga konin Pathen Theng ahunge. Aloupi nan vanmun jouse jolsel’in atomin, A vahchoina leiset adimset soh jenge. Selah
Avah jong chu khovah bangin avah jengin, Akhut’a konin jong nigui tobang akikho lah lah-e; Hitia hi aman Athahat ajedoh ji ahiye.
Amasanga gamna ahung kitol masan, Anunga jong thigamna thei ahung kitol kit nalaiye.

Pathen chu adingin leiset pumpi atetoh in, Chule aven namtin vaipi ahot lingsoh tai; Chutah chun tonsot’a umjing molsang jouse jong Akithe cheh soh-uvin, Atonsot geiya um jing thinglhang jouse chu alha nem in, Masanga bang bangin Pathen lampi jong aumkit tai.
Chujouvin Cushan mi ponbuh a bolgentheiya mi um kamun, Mid’ian gamsunga lhangsang jouse akihotnem soh hel’e.

O Pakai, vadung jouse chunga lungsa nahiya, Vadung jouse chunga hi lung hang nahim? Twikhanglen chunga lung himo nahiya, Hijeh a chu nasakolte chunga hung touva Nagaljona kangtalai ho Chunga hungtouji nahim?
Nalivatheiya konin nathalchang nakho thengsoh hel’in, Thalchang abonchan thalpi khaova natosoh keiye. Selah Leiset pumpi jong hi Lhanghoh jengin nalhaisah jenge.
Molsang jousen nang namu tenguleh Akihot lhulgam jiuvin ahi; Twikhang twipi kinong lai chu akitol tol jin, Lithuh lai laiyin jong othongje jun thu aseiyin, chunglam akhut te nin asangjie.
Nisa le lhathah jong aumna mun cheh a aumden lhonin, Nathalpi chang pah lah lah vah leh Natengkol val lah lah jeh chun Amoh dinden jeng lhone.
Pakai nangin leiset hi Lung phamo tah-in nachon hamding ding jengin, Nalunghan jeh-in jong Namtin vaipi hi nachotpha jenge.

Namite huhhinga aum theina diuvin Nangma nakondoh tan, Nathaonusa lengpa huhhing din Nangma nahung kondoh tai. Migiloupa chu ainsunga konin Alubuh navoh chip peh jengin, Akhelbuh a pat’in Angong chang geiyin akeovin nalupsah tai. Selah

Ama dinga gal-hatte chu nathal hemin Aluchangu nathilpai peh jengin. Keima nocheh a lehthang dia Chimpei kipei banga hung konpa chu hiti chun nabol’e; Mivaichate chu guhthima Abahgam hel ding hijongleh kipah nalaipa chu.
Nangman Twikhanglen le twipi kinong hamlet lut jong chu Nasakolte natil’in nachot thangsah jenge.

Ken kajah a ahileh katahsa akithing jengin. Agin husan in jong kanephu achatsep sup’e. Kagu kachang jouse amon lhasoh ding ahitan, Noilama kal kase jongleh kachondet theipoi; Eiho chunga gal hung bolte chunga Genthei hesoh hung lhung ding nikho chu thipbeh cha ka-nga ding ahi.

Theichang phung pah hih hen lang, Lengpiguiya jong aga pou hih jongleh; Olive thing galouvin um jeng jongle, Louma dung jouse imacha gadoh louva aum geiya jong Kelngoi hong sunga kona kelngoi kisugam hihen, Bongkul sunga jong bong beihel jeng jongleh;
Keivang Pakaiya kipah jing ing ting, Eihuhhingpa Pathena kakipa ding ahi.
Pathen, Pakai kitipa chu kathahat’a pang ahin, A man kakengphang teni jong sakhipi ho kengtin tobangin eisempeh-e; Hiti hin munsang lai laiya jong Eichop lesah theiyin ahi.
